TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kyu‚Äôang, title = Kyu‚Äôang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kyu‚Äôang} }

S.FORM: alang Kyu'ang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 40 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 75%, Tayan 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kyu'ang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 40 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 75%, Tayan 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kyu'ang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' llyung. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kyu'ang hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Kyu'ang hya' Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kju ĒaŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, s~…ēajs~…ēijat **%, tajan **%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē …£a oro Ēraw. taj mkjańßu Ē na kju ĒaŇč ńßja Ē kawaő≤ata. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
